title: Dragon Mace
description: Adds a mace with the powers of the dragon
body:
# **Dragon Mace: The Ultimate End-Tier Utility**

Dragon Mace is a high-performance utility and combat plugin for Paper 1.21.x. It introduces a legendary version of the Mace designed for late-game players who need a balance of massive damage, unmatched mobility, and defensive versatility. By harnessing the power of the Dragon Egg, this weapon allows the wielder to "Shift Dimensions" to adapt to any combat scenario.

## **⚒️ The Crafting Recipe**

The Dragon Mace is forged via a shapeless recipe (place materials anywhere in the grid):

- 1x Mace

- 1x Dragon Egg
 
- 1x Potion of Strength (3:00)

## **⚔️ Attributes & Passive Perks**

The weapon is Unbreakable and comes pre-enchanted with Density V, Breach IV, and Wind Burst II. While held in your main hand, you receive:

- Permanent Effects: Strength II, Speed II, and Fire Resistance.
 
- The Drawback: The intense energy causes you to Glow constantly, making you visible to all nearby players and mobs.

## **🔥 Ability Breakdown**

- Dragon Soar (Hold & Release): Stand still or move (do not crouch) and Hold Right-Click for 2 seconds to charge your dash. Once your Action Bar shows "Ready," Left-Click to launch 10+ blocks in the direction of your crosshair. Includes fall-damage protection and a 1.5s cooldown.

- Sonic Shockwave (Crouch + Right Click): Release a devastating blast that flings nearby entities 8 blocks away. This shockwave instantly vaporizes all Cobwebs in the area, ensuring you never get trapped.

- Dragon Strike (Passive): Every hit has a 15% chance to deal Double Damage and inflict the victim with Blindness (3m), Wither II (2m), and Slowness III (1m).

## **🌀 Shifting Dimensions (Mode Toggling)**

By holding Sprint + Crouch and Scrolling, you can cycle through five unique states. Your current mode is displayed on your Action Bar:

- Agility Mode: Permanent Jump Boost III.

- Stealth Mode: Permanent Invisibility.

- Tank Mode: Permanent Resistance V and Slowness IV (The ultimate defense).

- Bounce Mode: Immediately launches you 10 blocks upward upon selection.

- Off Mode: Disables all secondary passive effects.

## **🛠️ Technical Details**

- Platform: Paper, Purpur, or Spigot (1.21 - 1.21.11).

- Language: Java 21.

- API: Uses the modern Adventure (Component) API for a clean, non-deprecated experience.
